001package guiGradebook;
002
003import entityClasses.User;
004import javafx.geometry.Insets;
005import javafx.geometry.Pos;
006import javafx.scene.Scene;
007import javafx.scene.control.Alert;
008import javafx.scene.control.Button;
009import javafx.scene.control.Label;
010import javafx.scene.control.ListView;
011import javafx.scene.control.TextArea;
012import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane;
013import javafx.scene.layout.HBox;
014import javafx.scene.layout.Priority;
015import javafx.scene.layout.Region;
016import javafx.scene.layout.VBox;
017import javafx.scene.text.Font;
018import javafx.stage.Stage;
019
020public class ViewGradebook {
021
022        private static double width = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_WIDTH;
023        private static double height = applicationMain.FoundationsMain.WINDOW_HEIGHT;
024
025        private static ViewGradebook theView;
026        private static Scene theScene;
027        private static BorderPane rootPane;
028
029        protected static Stage theStage;
030        protected static User theUser;
031
032        private static Label label_Title = new Label("Teacher Gradebook");
033        private static Label label_User = new Label();
034        private static Label label_Help = new Label("Pick a student to verify rule-of-three completion.");
035
036        protected static ListView<String> list_Students = new ListView<String>();
037        protected static TextArea text_Review = new TextArea();
038
039        private static Button button_Refresh = new Button("Refresh Students");
040        private static Button button_View = new Button("View Selected Student");
041        private static Button button_Return = new Button("Return");
042
043        private static Alert alert = new Alert(Alert.AlertType.INFORMATION);
044
045        public static void displayGradebook(Stage stage, User user) {
046                theStage = stage;
047                theUser = user;
048
049                if (theView == null) {
050                        theView = new ViewGradebook();
051                }
052
053                if (!ControllerGradebook.canAccess()) {
054                        showMessage("Access denied: students cannot open the grading page.");
055                        guiStudentHome.ViewStudentHome.displayStudentHome(theStage, theUser);
056                        return;
057                }
058
059                label_User.setText("Teacher Account: " + theUser.getUserName());
060                ControllerGradebook.loadStudents();
061
062                theStage.setTitle("CSE 360 Foundations: Teacher Gradebook");
063                theStage.setScene(theScene);
064                theStage.setMaximized(true);
065                theStage.show();
066        }
067
068        private ViewGradebook() {
069                rootPane = new BorderPane();
070                rootPane.setPadding(new Insets(16));
071                theScene = new Scene(rootPane, width, height);
072
073                setupLabel(label_Title, 28);
074                setupLabel(label_User, 18);
075                setupLabel(label_Help, 14);
076
077                label_Title.setAlignment(Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
078                label_User.setAlignment(Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
079                label_Help.setAlignment(Pos.CENTER_LEFT);
080
081                VBox topBox = new VBox(4);
082                topBox.getChildren().addAll(label_Title, label_User, label_Help);
083
084                list_Students.setPrefWidth(260);
085                list_Students.setMinWidth(220);
086
087                text_Review.setWrapText(true);
088                text_Review.setEditable(false);
089                text_Review.setPrefHeight(500);
090
091                setupButton(button_Refresh, 150, (_) -> ControllerGradebook.loadStudents());
092                setupButton(button_View, 190, (_) -> ControllerGradebook.reviewSelectedStudent());
093                setupButton(button_Return, 120, (_) -> ControllerGradebook.performReturn());
094
095                VBox leftBox = new VBox(10);
096                leftBox.getChildren().addAll(new Label("Students"), list_Students, button_Refresh, button_View);
097                leftBox.setPadding(new Insets(0, 14, 0, 0));
098                VBox.setVgrow(list_Students, Priority.ALWAYS);
099
100                VBox centerBox = new VBox(8);
101                centerBox.getChildren().addAll(new Label("Gradebook Review"), text_Review);
102                VBox.setVgrow(text_Review, Priority.ALWAYS);
103
104                Region spacer = new Region();
105                HBox.setHgrow(spacer, Priority.ALWAYS);
106                HBox footer = new HBox(10);
107                footer.getChildren().addAll(spacer, button_Return);
108
109                rootPane.setTop(topBox);
110                rootPane.setLeft(leftBox);
111                rootPane.setCenter(centerBox);
112                rootPane.setBottom(footer);
113                BorderPane.setMargin(leftBox, new Insets(10, 0, 0, 0));
114                BorderPane.setMargin(centerBox, new Insets(10, 0, 0, 0));
115                BorderPane.setMargin(footer, new Insets(12, 0, 0, 0));
116
117                alert.setTitle("Gradebook");
118                alert.setHeaderText(null);
119        }
120
121        private static void setupLabel(Label label, double size) {
122                label.setFont(Font.font("Arial", size));
123        }
124
125        private static void setupButton(Button button, double minWidth,
126                        javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent> handler) {
127                button.setMinWidth(minWidth);
128                button.setOnAction(handler);
129        }
130
131        private static void showMessage(String message) {
132                alert.setContentText(message);
133                alert.showAndWait();
134        }
135}
